title: Amortized Analysis and Dynamic Structures
description: Guarantee long-run latency for a structure with occasional expensive rebuilds. Learners cumulatively produce an amortized-cost ledger and implementation through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Bound total operation cost over a sequence and derive amortized cost.
Assign credits that cover future expensive operations without negative balances.
Define a nonnegative potential and calculate amortized cost changes.
